blocks.body: Product Rule: x^a x x^b = x^(a+b). Add exponents when multiplying like bases. Example: x^3 x x^5 = x^8.
Quotient Rule: x^a / x^b = x^(a-b). Subtract exponents when dividing like bases. Example: x^7 / x^3 = x^4.
Power of a Power: (x^a)^b = x^(ab). Multiply exponents. Example: (x^3)^4 = x^12.
Power of a Product: (xy)^n = x^n y^n. Apply the exponent to each factor. Example: (2x^2)^3 = 8x^6.
Power of a Quotient: (x/y)^n = x^n / y^n. Example: (a/b)^4 = a^4/b^4.
